profile.name: Apex Plumbing & Rooter
profile.description: Apex Plumbing & Rooter has been providing premium commercial and residential drain cleaning, pipe replacements, and emergency plumbing services in the Bay Area and Las Vegas since 2012.

leads.title: Emergency Gas Water Heater Leak
leads.description: Emergency gas water heater tank is leaking. Basement floor has water pooling. Customer needs a plumber out immediately.

leads.title: Whole Home PEX Repiping
leads.description: Aging copper pipes corroding, causing low water pressure and rust-colored water in a single-family home. Homeowner wants a full replacement with modern PEX piping.

leads.title: Commercial Flat Roof Patch & Seal
leads.description: Active leaks detected over the main warehouse bay. Flat TPO roofing needs patching, sealing, and a reflective coating applied before the heat increases.

leads.title: Gas Water Heater Leak & Replacement
leads.description: 50-gallon gas water heater is leaking from the bottom valve. Needs immediate replacement with a energy-efficient unit.

leads.title: Emergency Shingle Roof Repair
leads.description: Wind damage caused shingles to blow off a residential roof. Water is starting to seep into the attic. Needs immediate tarping and shingle patch.
